past_interactions.summary: The learner practiced using role, instruction, context, constraints, and examples to improve model responses.
The learner built a simple chatbot interface using Gradio ChatInterface.
The learner learned that without memory, each input is treated independently.
The learner learned that appending chat history helps the bot remember but causes the prompt to grow quickly.

saved_facts: The learner is working on Project 1: Context-Aware Chatbot with Memory.
The learner has not learned full RAG yet.
The learner should focus on memory, retrieval, and prompt structure first.
